title: Roofing Calculator Squares - Materials Estimate
description: Free roofing calculator in squares. Calculate how many roofing squares you need, plus materials like shingles, underlayment, and nails.
keywords: roofing calculator squares, roof area calculator, shingles calculator, roofing materials, roof square footage
intro: Calculate how many roofing squares your project needs. One roofing square = 100 square feet. Enter your roof dimensions.

faq.a: A roofing square is a unit of measurement equal to 100 square feet (10×10 area). It's the standard unit for ordering roofing materials.

faq.q: How do I account for roof pitch?

faq.a: Standard 3-tab shingles: 3 bundles per square. Architectural shingles: 3-5 bundles per square depending on brand.
